file.content:
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Build Commands

**Critical: SwissKitJ-Api must be installed before the main module:**

```bash
# Install API module first (required for any build)
mvn install -f SwissKitJ-Api/pom.xml -DskipTests

# Clean build with executable JAR
mvn clean package

# Skip tests during build
mvn clean package -DskipTests

# Run application directly (no JAR packaging)
mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass="fan.summer.Main"

# Run tests
mvn test
```

## Architecture

### Multi-Module Maven Structure

Build order matters:
1. `SwissKitJ-Api` - Shared API (interfaces, annotations, UI components)
2. `SwissKit` - Main application
3. `OfficalPlugin/*` - Built-in plugins

### Plugin System

SwissKit uses SPI (Service Provider Interface) for automatic tool discovery:

1. Implement `KitPage` interface from `fan.summer.api`
2. Annotate with `@SwissKitPage` from `fan.summer.annoattion`
3. Register in `META-INF/services/fan.summer.api.KitPage`
4. Pages auto-discovered and sorted by `order()` value at runtime

### Entry Point

- `fan.summer.Main` - Application entry point
- `SwissKitPageScaner` - Discovers all `KitPage` implementations via SPI

### Database

- **Location**: `.swisskit/swisskit.db` (relative to runtime directory)
- **Type**: H2 embedded database
- **Access**: MyBatis `SqlSession` via `DatabaseInit.getSqlSession()`
- **Auto-initialized**: Tables created on first run via `init.sql`

### UI Pattern

- JavaFX with MaterialFX 11.17.0 theming
- FXML-based UI layouts in `css/uiFxml/` directories
- Background tasks via `Task` subclasses (javafx.concurrent)
- Custom UI components and theming in `fan.summer.ui` packages
- Theme management via `ThemeManager`, scaling via `ScaleManager`

### Key Packages

- `fan.summer.kitpage/` - Tool pages (Excel, Email, Settings, Welcome)
- `fan.summer.ui/` - JavaFX UI components, theme, scaling, loading screens
- `fan.summer.database/` - MyBatis entities and mappers
- `fan.summer.plugin/` - Plugin loading system
- `fan.summer.utils/` - Utilities (EmailUtil, ExcelUtil, etc.)

## Tech Stack

| Component       | Technology                  |
|-----------------|-----------------------------|
| Language        | Java 17                     |
| Build           | Maven 3.6+                  |
| UI              | JavaFX 21 + MaterialFX 11.17|
| Excel           | Apache FESOD 2.0.1         |
| Database        | H2 2.4.240 + MyBatis 3.5.19|
| Email           | Simple Java Mail 8.12.6    |
| JSON            | FastJSON2 2.0.59           |
| Logging         | Log4j2 + SLF4J             |

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<?import io.github.palexdev.materialfx.controls.MFXScrollPane?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Label?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>

<BorderPane
        prefHeight="700.0"
        prefWidth="1100.0"
        xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21"
        xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"
        fx:controller="fan.summer.controller.MainController">

    <left>
        <VBox prefWidth="220" styleClass="sidebar">
            <HBox styleClass="sidebar-header" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                <Label text="SwissKit" styleClass="app-title"/>
            </HBox>
            <MFXScrollPane fitToWidth="true" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS">
                <VBox fx:id="menuContainer" styleClass="menu-container" spacing="4"/>
            </MFXScrollPane>
        </VBox>
    </left>

    <center>
        <StackPane fx:id="contentArea" styleClass="content-area"/>
    </center>

</BorderPane>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<?import javafx.scene.control.Label?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?>
<?import javafx.scene.shape.Circle?>
<?import io.github.palexdev.materialfx.controls.MFXButton?>
<?import io.github.palexdev.materialfx.controls.MFXScrollPane?>
<?import io.github.palexdev.materialfx.controls.MFXTextField?>

<BorderPane
        prefHeight="620.0"
        prefWidth="960.0"
        xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21"
        xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"
        fx:controller="fan.summer.controller.MainController"
        styleClass="app-window">

    <!-- 标题栏 - 无边框窗口 -->
    <top>
        <HBox styleClass="titlebar" prefHeight="44">
            <!-- Traffic Lights -->
            <HBox styleClass="traffic-lights" spacing="8" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                <StackPane>
                    <Circle radius="6" styleClass="tl-close"/>
                    <Label text="✕" styleClass="tl-icon"/>
                </StackPane>
                <StackPane>
                    <Circle radius="6" styleClass="tl-min"/>
                    <Label text="−" styleClass="tl-icon"/>
                </StackPane>
                <StackPane>
                    <Circle radius="6" styleClass="tl-max"/>
                    <Label text="+" styleClass="tl-icon"/>
                </StackPane>
            </HBox>

            <!-- 标题 -->
            <Label text="SwissKit" styleClass="titlebar-title" maxWidth="1" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>

            <!-- 操作按钮 -->
            <HBox styleClass="titlebar-actions" spacing="8">
                <MFXButton styleClass="titlebar-btn" text="🔔" tooltip="通知"/>
                <MFXButton styleClass="titlebar-btn" text="⚙️" tooltip="设置" onAction="#openSettings"/>
            </HBox>
        </HBox>
    </top>

    <!-- 主体区域 -->
    <center>
        <HBox styleClass="app-body">

            <!-- 侧边栏 -->
            <VBox styleClass="sidebar" prefWidth="220">
                <!-- 工具分类列表 -->
                <VBox styleClass="sidebar-section">
                    <Label text="工具" styleClass="sidebar-section-label"/>
                    <VBox fx:id="navTools" styleClass="nav-list" spacing="2"/>
                </VBox>

                <!-- 插件列表 -->
                <VBox styleClass="sidebar-section">
                    <Label text="插件" styleClass="sidebar-section-label"/>
                    <VBox fx:id="navPlugins" styleClass="nav-list" spacing="2"/>
                </VBox>

                <!-- 收藏夹 -->
                <VBox styleClass="sidebar-section">
                    <Label text="收藏" styleClass="sidebar-section-label"/>
                    <VBox fx:id="navFavorites" styleClass="nav-list" spacing="2"/>
                </VBox>

                <!-- 设置入口 -->
                <VBox VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                <HBox styleClass="sidebar-footer" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                    <MFXButton text="⚙️ 设置" styleClass="nav-item" onAction="#openSettings"/>
                </HBox>
            </VBox>

            <!-- 内容区 -->
            <VBox styleClass="content-area" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS">

                <!-- 搜索栏 -->
                <HBox styleClass="search-wrap">
                    <MFXTextField fx:id="searchField"
                                  styleClass="search-bar"
                                  promptText="搜索工具..."
                                  prefHeight="38"
                                  floatMode="DISABLED"/>
                    <Label text="⌘K" styleClass="search-kbd"/>
                </HBox>

                <!-- 工具网格区域 -->
                <MFXScrollPane styleClass="content-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS">
                    <VBox spacing="16">
                        <!-- 常用工具 -->
                        <VBox styleClass="section">
                            <HBox styleClass="section-header" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                                <Label text="常用工具" styleClass="section-title"/>
                                <Label text="查看全部 →" styleClass="section-action"/>
                            </HBox>
                            <ScrollPane styleClass="tools-scroll" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="NEVER">
                                <FlowPane fx:id="toolsGrid" styleClass="tools-grid" hgap="10" vgap="10"/>
                            </ScrollPane>
                        </VBox>

                        <!-- 最近使用 -->
                        <VBox styleClass="section">
                            <Label text="最近使用" styleClass="section-title"/>
                            <ScrollPane styleClass="tools-scroll" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="NEVER">
                                <FlowPane fx:id="recentGrid" styleClass="tools-grid" hgap="10" vgap="10"/>
                            </ScrollPane>
                        </VBox>
                    </VBox>
                </MFXScrollPane>

                <!-- 详情面板 (初始隐藏) -->
                <VBox fx:id="detailPanel" styleClass="detail-panel" managed="false" visible="false" prefWidth="260">
                    <HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT">
                        <MFXButton text="✕" styleClass="detail-close" onAction="#closeDetail"/>
                    </HBox>
                    <VBox styleClass="detail-content" spacing="8">
                        <HBox styleClass="detail-icon-wrap" alignment="CENTER" prefWidth="56" prefHeight="56">
                            <Label fx:id="detailIcon" text="🔧" styleClass="detail-icon"/>
                        </HBox>
                        <Label fx:id="detailName" text="工具名称" styleClass="detail-name"/>
                        <Label fx:id="detailMeta" text="v1.0.0 · 内置" styleClass="detail-meta"/>
                        <Label fx:id="detailDesc" text="工具描述内容" styleClass="detail-desc" wrapText="true"/>
                        <MFXButton text="启动工具" styleClass="detail-launch" onAction="#launchTool"/>
                        <Separator styleClass="detail-divider"/>
                        <GridPane styleClass="detail-props" vgap="8">
                            <Label text="版本" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpVersion" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                            <Label text="类型" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpType" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                            <Label text="分类" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpCat" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                            <Label text="上次使用" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpLast" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                        </GridPane>
                    </VBox>
                </VBox>
            </VBox>

        </HBox>
    </center>

    <!-- 状态栏 -->
    <bottom>
        <HBox styleClass="statusbar" prefHeight="28" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16">
            <Circle radius="3" styleClass="status-dot"/>
            <Label fx:id="statusTools" text="12 个工具" styleClass="status-text"/>
            <Label text="·" styleClass="status-sep"/>
            <Label fx:id="statusPlugins" text="3 个插件已加载" styleClass="status-text"/>
            <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
            <Label fx:id="statusClock" text="00:00:00" styleClass="status-text"/>
        </HBox>
    </bottom>

</BorderPane>

Usage Example:

13 * 
14	 * {@code @SwissKitPage(menuName = "Excel", menuTooltip = "Excel file processing", order = 1)}

21 * 22 * @author phoebej 23 * @since 1.0.0 24 */ 25 @Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME) 26 @Target(ElementType.TYPE) 27 public @interface SwissKitPage { 28 29 /** 30 * Unique identifier for the plugin. 31 * Used for plugin lifecycle management and dependency resolution. 32 * 33 * @return plugin name 34 */ 35 String pluginName() default ""; 36 37 /** 38 * Version string of the plugin in semver format (e.g., "1.0.0"). 39 * Used for compatibility checks and update detection. 40 * 41 * @return plugin version 42 */ 43 String pluginVersion() default ""; 44 45 /** 46 * Menu display name shown in the sidebar navigation. 47 * If empty, the simple class name will be used as fallback. 48 * 49 * @return menu display name 50 */ 51 String menuName(); 52 53 /** 54 * Resource bundle key for menu display name (for i18n support). 55 * If non-empty, the menu name will be looked up from the i18n bundle 56 * instead of using menuName directly. 57 * Example: "menu.excel" will resolve to localized text. 58 * 59 * @return menu name i18n key, or empty for no i18n lookup 60 */ 61 String menuNameKey() default ""; 62 63 /** 64 * Menu tooltip text shown on hover. 65 * 66 * @return tooltip text 67 */ 68 String menuTooltip() default ""; 69 70 /** 71 * Whether this page is visible in the menu. 72 * Set to false to hide from menu but keep the page accessible programmatically. 73 * 74 * @return true if visible, false otherwise 75 */ 76 boolean visible() default true; 77 78 /** 79 * Menu item order for sorting. 80 * Lower values appear first in the menu. 81 * 82 * @return order value 83 */ 84 int order() default 0; 85 86 /** 87 * Menu icon path (optional). 88 * Can be a classpath resource path or file path. 89 * 90 * @return icon path, or empty string for no icon 91 */ 92 String iconPath() default ""; 93 94 /** 95 * Method name to retrieve the panel from the page. 96 * The annotated class must have a public method with this name 97 * that returns a {@link javax.swing.JPanel}. 98 * 99 * @return panel retrieval method name 100 */ 101 String panelMethod() default "getPanel"; content.thinking: The annotation has `panelMethod` pointing to `getPanel` for Swing. I need to add an alternative for JavaFX that returns `getContent` or `getNode`. Let me update the annotation to support both Swing and JavaFX.

input.new_string:
/**
     * Method name to retrieve the panel from the page (Swing).
     * The annotated class must have a public method with this name
     * that returns a {@link javax.swing.JPanel}.
     *
     * @return panel retrieval method name
     */
    String panelMethod() default "getPanel";

    /**
     * Method name to retrieve the content Node from the page (JavaFX).
     * The annotated class must have a public method with this name
     * that returns a {@link javafx.scene.Node}.
     *
     * @return node retrieval method name
     */
    String nodeMethod() default "getContent";
}

     * @return panel retrieval method name
     */
    String panelMethod() default "getPanel";

    /**
     * Method name to retrieve the content Node from the page (JavaFX).
     * The annotated class must have a public method with this name
     * that returns a {@link javafx.scene.Node}.
     *
     * @return node retrieval method name
     */
    String nodeMethod() default "getContent";
}

# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Build Commands

**Critical: SwissKitJ-Api must be installed before the main module:**

```bash
# Install API module first (required for any build)
mvn install -f SwissKitJ-Api/pom.xml -DskipTests

# Clean build with executable JAR
mvn clean package

# Skip tests during build
mvn clean package -DskipTests

# Run application directly (no JAR packaging)
mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass="fan.summer.Main"

# Run tests
mvn test
```

## Architecture

### Multi-Module Maven Structure

Build order matters:
1. `SwissKitJ-Api` - Shared API (interfaces, annotations, UI components)
2. `SwissKit` - Main application
3. `OfficalPlugin/*` - Built-in plugins

### Plugin System

SwissKit uses SPI (Service Provider Interface) for automatic tool discovery:

1. Implement `KitPage` interface from `fan.summer.api`
2. Annotate with `@SwissKitPage` from `fan.summer.annoattion`
3. Register in `META-INF/services/fan.summer.api.KitPage`
4. Pages auto-discovered and sorted by `order()` value at runtime

### Entry Point

- `fan.summer.Main` - Application entry point
- `SwissKitPageScaner` - Discovers all `KitPage` implementations via SPI

### Database

- **Location**: `.swisskit/swisskit.db` (relative to runtime directory)
- **Type**: H2 embedded database
- **Access**: MyBatis `SqlSession` via `DatabaseInit.getSqlSession()`
- **Auto-initialized**: Tables created on first run via `init.sql`

### UI Pattern

- JavaFX with MaterialFX 11.17.0 theming
- FXML-based UI layouts in `css/uiFxml/` directories
- Background tasks via `Task` subclasses (javafx.concurrent)
- Custom UI components and theming in `fan.summer.ui` packages
- Theme management via `ThemeManager`, scaling via `ScaleManager`

### Key Packages

- `fan.summer.kitpage/` - Tool pages (Excel, Email, Settings, Welcome)
- `fan.summer.ui/` - JavaFX UI components, theme, scaling, loading screens
- `fan.summer.database/` - MyBatis entities and mappers
- `fan.summer.plugin/` - Plugin loading system
- `fan.summer.utils/` - Utilities (EmailUtil, ExcelUtil, etc.)

## Tech Stack

| Component       | Technology                  |
|-----------------|-----------------------------|
| Language        | Java 21                     |
| Build           | Maven 3.6+                  |
| UI              | JavaFX 21 + MaterialFX 11.17|
| Excel           | Apache FESOD 2.0.1         |
| Database        | H2 2.4.240 + MyBatis 3.5.19|
| Email           | Simple Java Mail 8.12.6    |
| JSON            | FastJSON2 2.0.59           |
| Logging         | Log4j2 + SLF4J             |

input.new_string:
### Plugin System

SwissKit uses SPI (Service Provider Interface) for automatic tool discovery:

1. Implement `KitPage` interface from `fan.summer.api`
2. Annotate with `@SwissKitPage` from `fan.summer.annoattion`
3. Register in `META-INF/services/fan.summer.api.KitPage`
4. Pages auto-discovered and sorted by `order()` value at runtime

**Plugin Architecture:**
- `PluginAPI` - Interface for plugins to communicate with host app
- `PluginRegistry` - Manages plugin UI injection and lifecycle
- `PluginLoader` - Hot-loads JAR plugins with isolated classloaders
- `PluginService` - Facade for plugin lifecycle (deploy/upgrade/uninstall)

**Content Injection:**
Plugins provide content via `getContent()` method (returns `Node` for JavaFX or `JPanel` for Swing). The `PluginRegistry` handles injecting plugin content into the main window's content area via `ContentProvider` callbacks.

### Entry Point

- `fan.summer.Main` - Application entry point (Swing → being migrated to JavaFX)
- `fan.summer.ui.home.HomePage` - Main JavaFX container
- `fan.summer.controller.MainController` - JavaFX window controller
- `SwissKitPageScaner` - Discovers all `KitPage` implementations via SPI

## 布局还原 (app.fxml)
- BorderPane 结构：top(标题栏) + center(app-body) + bottom(状态栏)

## CSS 玻璃样式 (app.css)
- 深色半透明背景 `rgba(13, 14, 17, 0.72)`
- 玻璃边框效果 `-sw-glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10)`
- 主题色变量：`--sw-accent: #5b8cf7`
- 导航项、工具卡片、详情面板的完整样式

## 插件系统骨架
- `PluginAPI` - 插件与宿主通信的接口(onLoad/onUnload/onSelected + getContent)
- `PluginRegistry` - 管理插件UI注入(ContentProvider回调机制)
- `MainController` - JavaFX控制器，处理导航和内容切换

- 新增 `nodeMethod()` 属性，支持JavaFX的 `getContent()` 方法

36	
37	SwissKit uses SPI (Service Provider Interface) for automatic tool discovery:
38	
39	1. Implement `KitPage` interface from `fan.summer.api`
40	2. Annotate with `@SwissKitPage` from `fan.summer.annoattion`
41	3. Register in `META-INF/services/fan.summer.api.KitPage`
42	4. Pages auto-discovered and sorted by `order()` value at runtime
43	
44	**Plugin Architecture:**
45	- `PluginAPI` - Interface for plugins to communicate with host app
46	- `PluginRegistry` - Manages plugin UI injection and lifecycle
47	- `PluginLoader` - Hot-loads JAR plugins with isolated classloaders
48	- `PluginService` - Facade for plugin lifecycle (deploy/upgrade/uninstall)
49	
50	**Content Injection:**
51	Plugins provide content via `getContent()` method (returns `Node` for JavaFX or `JPanel` for Swing). The `PluginRegistry` handles injecting plugin content into the main window's content area via `ContentProvider` callbacks.
52	
53	### Entry Point
54	
55	- `fan.summer.Main` - Application entry point (Swing → being migrated to JavaFX)
56	- `fan.summer.ui.home.HomePage` - Main JavaFX container
57	- `fan.summer.controller.MainController` - JavaFX window controller
58	- `SwissKitPageScaner` - Discovers all `KitPage` implementations via SPI
59	
60	### Database
61	
62	- **Location**: `.swisskit/swisskit.db` (relative to runtime directory)
63	- **Type**: H2 embedded database
64	- **Access**: MyBatis `SqlSession` via `DatabaseInit.getSqlSession()`
65	- **Auto-initialized**: Tables created on first run via `init.sql`

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<?import javafx.scene.control.Label?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?>
<?import javafx.scene.shape.Circle?>
<?import io.github.palexdev.materialfx.controls.MFXButton?>
<?import io.github.palexdev.materialfx.controls.MFXScrollPane?>
<?import io.github.palexdev.materialfx.controls.MFXTextField?>

<BorderPane
        prefHeight="620.0"
        prefWidth="960.0"
        xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21"
        xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"
        fx:controller="fan.summer.controller.MainController"
        styleClass="app-window">

    <!-- 标题栏 - 无边框窗口 -->
    <top>
        <HBox styleClass="titlebar" prefHeight="44">
            <!-- Traffic Lights -->
            <HBox styleClass="traffic-lights" spacing="8" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                <StackPane>
                    <Circle radius="6" styleClass="tl-close"/>
                    <Label text="✕" styleClass="tl-icon"/>
                </StackPane>
                <StackPane>
                    <Circle radius="6" styleClass="tl-min"/>
                    <Label text="−" styleClass="tl-icon"/>
                </StackPane>
                <StackPane>
                    <Circle radius="6" styleClass="tl-max"/>
                    <Label text="+" styleClass="tl-icon"/>
                </StackPane>
            </HBox>

            <!-- 标题 -->
            <Label text="SwissKit" styleClass="titlebar-title" maxWidth="1" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>

            <!-- 操作按钮 -->
            <HBox styleClass="titlebar-actions" spacing="8">
                <MFXButton styleClass="titlebar-btn" text="🔔" tooltip="通知"/>
                <MFXButton styleClass="titlebar-btn" text="⚙️" tooltip="设置" onAction="#openSettings"/>
            </HBox>
        </HBox>
    </top>

    <!-- 主体区域 -->
    <center>
        <HBox styleClass="app-body">

            <!-- 侧边栏 -->
            <VBox styleClass="sidebar" prefWidth="220">
                <!-- 工具分类列表 -->
                <VBox styleClass="sidebar-section">
                    <Label text="工具" styleClass="sidebar-section-label"/>
                    <VBox fx:id="navTools" styleClass="nav-list" spacing="2"/>
                </VBox>

                <!-- 插件列表 -->
                <VBox styleClass="sidebar-section">
                    <Label text="插件" styleClass="sidebar-section-label"/>
                    <VBox fx:id="navPlugins" styleClass="nav-list" spacing="2"/>
                </VBox>

                <!-- 收藏夹 -->
                <VBox styleClass="sidebar-section">
                    <Label text="收藏" styleClass="sidebar-section-label"/>
                    <VBox fx:id="navFavorites" styleClass="nav-list" spacing="2"/>
                </VBox>

                <!-- 设置入口 -->
                <VBox VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                <HBox styleClass="sidebar-footer" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                    <MFXButton text="⚙️ 设置" styleClass="nav-item" onAction="#openSettings"/>
                </HBox>
            </VBox>

            <!-- 内容区 -->
            <VBox styleClass="content-area" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS">

                <!-- 搜索栏 -->
                <HBox styleClass="search-wrap">
                    <MFXTextField fx:id="searchField"
                                  styleClass="search-bar"
                                  promptText="搜索工具..."
                                  prefHeight="38"
                                  floatMode="DISABLED"/>
                    <Label text="⌘K" styleClass="search-kbd"/>
                </HBox>

                <!-- 工具网格区域 -->
                <MFXScrollPane styleClass="content-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS">
                    <VBox spacing="16">
                        <!-- 常用工具 -->
                        <VBox styleClass="section">
                            <HBox styleClass="section-header" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                                <Label text="常用工具" styleClass="section-title"/>
                                <Label text="查看全部 →" styleClass="section-action"/>
                            </HBox>
                            <ScrollPane styleClass="tools-scroll" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="NEVER">
                                <FlowPane fx:id="toolsGrid" styleClass="tools-grid" hgap="10" vgap="10"/>
                            </ScrollPane>
                        </VBox>

                        <!-- 最近使用 -->
                        <VBox styleClass="section">
                            <Label text="最近使用" styleClass="section-title"/>
                            <ScrollPane styleClass="tools-scroll" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="NEVER">
                                <FlowPane fx:id="recentGrid" styleClass="tools-grid" hgap="10" vgap="10"/>
                            </ScrollPane>
                        </VBox>
                    </VBox>
                </MFXScrollPane>

                <!-- 详情面板 (初始隐藏) -->
                <VBox fx:id="detailPanel" styleClass="detail-panel" managed="false" visible="false" prefWidth="260">
                    <HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT">
                        <MFXButton text="✕" styleClass="detail-close" onAction="#closeDetail"/>
                    </HBox>
                    <VBox styleClass="detail-content" spacing="8">
                        <HBox styleClass="detail-icon-wrap" alignment="CENTER" prefWidth="56" prefHeight="56">
                            <Label fx:id="detailIcon" text="🔧" styleClass="detail-icon"/>
                        </HBox>
                        <Label fx:id="detailName" text="工具名称" styleClass="detail-name"/>
                        <Label fx:id="detailMeta" text="v1.0.0 · 内置" styleClass="detail-meta"/>
                        <Label fx:id="detailDesc" text="工具描述内容" styleClass="detail-desc" wrapText="true"/>
                        <MFXButton text="启动工具" styleClass="detail-launch" onAction="#launchTool"/>
                        <Separator styleClass="detail-divider"/>
                        <GridPane styleClass="detail-props" vgap="8">
                            <Label text="版本" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpVersion" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                            <Label text="类型" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpType" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                            <Label text="分类" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpCat" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                            <Label text="上次使用" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpLast" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                        </GridPane>
                    </VBox>
                </VBox>
            </VBox>

        </HBox>
    </center>

    <!-- 状态栏 -->
    <bottom>
        <HBox styleClass="statusbar" prefHeight="28" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16">
            <Circle radius="3" styleClass="status-dot"/>
            <Label fx:id="statusTools" text="12 个工具" styleClass="status-text"/>
            <Label text="·" styleClass="status-sep"/>
            <Label fx:id="statusPlugins" text="3 个插件已加载" styleClass="status-text"/>
            <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
            <Label fx:id="statusClock" text="00:00:00" styleClass="status-text"/>
        </HBox>
    </bottom>

</BorderPane>

1 package fan.summer.annoattion; 2 3 import java.lang.annotation.ElementType; 4 import java.lang.annotation.Retention; 5 import java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy; 6 import java.lang.annotation.Target; 7 8 /** 9 * Annotation to mark a class as a KitPage implementation. 10 * Used for automatic page registration and menu configuration. 11 * 12 *

Usage Example:

13 * 
14	 * {@code @SwissKitPage(menuName = "Excel", menuTooltip = "Excel file processing", order = 1)}
15	 * public class ExcelKitPage extends JPanel {
16	 *     public ExcelKitPage() {
17	 *         // initialize your UI
18	 *     }
19	 * }
20	 *
21 * 22 * @author phoebej 23 * @since 1.0.0 24 */ 25 @Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME) 26 @Target(ElementType.TYPE) 27 public @interface SwissKitPage { 28 29 /** 30 * Unique identifier for the plugin. 31 * Used for plugin lifecycle management and dependency resolution. 32 * 33 * @return plugin name 34 */ 35 String pluginName() default ""; 36 37 /** 38 * Version string of the plugin in semver format (e.g., "1.0.0"). 39 * Used for compatibility checks and update detection. 40 * 41 * @return plugin version 42 */ 43 String pluginVersion() default ""; 44 45 /** 46 * Menu display name shown in the sidebar navigation. 47 * If empty, the simple class name will be used as fallback. 48 * 49 * @return menu display name 50 */ 51 String menuName(); 52 53 /** 54 * Resource bundle key for menu display name (for i18n support). 55 * If non-empty, the menu name will be looked up from the i18n bundle 56 * instead of using menuName directly. 57 * Example: "menu.excel" will resolve to localized text. 58 * 59 * @return menu name i18n key, or empty for no i18n lookup 60 */ 61 String menuNameKey() default ""; 62 63 /** 64 * Menu tooltip text shown on hover. 65 * 66 * @return tooltip text 67 */ 68 String menuTooltip() default ""; 69 70 /** 71 * Whether this page is visible in the menu. 72 * Set to false to hide from menu but keep the page accessible programmatically. 73 * 74 * @return true if visible, false otherwise 75 */ 76 boolean visible() default true; 77 78 /** 79 * Menu item order for sorting. 80 * Lower values appear first in the menu. 81 * 82 * @return order value 83 */ 84 int order() default 0; 85 86 /** 87 * Menu icon path (optional). 88 * Can be a classpath resource path or file path. 89 * 90 * @return icon path, or empty string for no icon 91 */ 92 String iconPath() default ""; 93 94 /** 95 * Method name to retrieve the panel from the page (Swing). 96 * The annotated class must have a public method with this name 97 * that returns a {@link javax.swing.JPanel}. 98 * 99 * @return panel retrieval method name 100 */ 101 String panelMethod() default "getPanel"; 102 103 /** 104 * Method name to retrieve the content Node from the page (JavaFX). 105 * The annotated class must have a public method with this name 106 * that returns a {@link javafx.scene.Node}. 107 * 108 * @return node retrieval method name 109 */ 110 String nodeMethod() default "getContent"; 111 } 112

1 package fan.summer.api; 2 3 import javafx.scene.Node; 4 5 /** 6 * Plugin API interface that plugins use to communicate with the host application. 7 * Each plugin receives a PluginContext instance when it is loaded. 8 * 9 *

Plugins should implement KitPage to be discovered, and can optionally 10 * implement this interface to receive lifecycle callbacks.

11 * 12 *

Example plugin implementation:

13 * 
{@code
14	 * @SwissKitPage(menuName = "My Tool", order = 10)
15	 * public class MyToolPage implements KitPage, PluginAPI {
16	 *     private Node content;
17	 *     private PluginContext context;
18	 *
19	 *     @Override
20	 *     public Node getContent() {
21	 *         return content;
22	 *     }
23	 *
24	 *     @Override
25	 *     public void onLoad(PluginContext context) {
26	 *         this.context = context;
27	 *         // Initialize plugin resources
28	 *     }
29	 *
30	 *     @Override
31	 *     public void onUnload() {
32	 *         // Cleanup resources
33	 *     }
34	 *
35	 *     @Override
36	 *     public void onSelected() {
37	 *         // Plugin was selected in UI
38	 *     }
39	 * }
40	 * }
41 */ 42 public interface PluginAPI { 43 44 /** 45 * Called when the plugin is loaded by the host application. 46 * 47 * @param context provides access to host services 48 */ 49 default void onLoad(PluginContext context) {} 50 51 /** 52 * Called when the plugin is unloaded or the application shuts down. 53 * Release any resources acquired during onLoad(). 54 */ 55 default void onUnload() {} 56 57 /** 58 * Called when the plugin is selected/activated in the UI. 59 * Use this to refresh data or start background tasks. 60 */ 61 default void onSelected() {} 62 63 /** 64 * Called when the plugin is deselected. 65 * Use this to pause background tasks or save state. 66 */ 67 default void onDeselected() {} 68 69 /** 70 * Returns the main content Node for this plugin. 71 * This will be injected into the application's content area. 72 * 73 * @return the Node to display 74 */ 75 Node getContent(); 76 77 /** 78 * Returns metadata about this plugin. 79 * 80 * @return plugin metadata 81 */ 82 default PluginAPIMetadata getMetadata() { 83 return new PluginAPIMetadata(getClass().getSimpleName(), "1.0.0"); 84 } 85 86 /** 87 * Context interface providing access to host application services. 88 */ 89 interface PluginContext { 90 /** 91 * Get the application stage controller. 92 */ 93 Object getMainController(); 94 95 /** 96 * Get the plugin registry for registering content. 97 */ 98 PluginRegistry getRegistry(); 99 100 /** 101 * Get a configuration value. 102 * 103 * @param key configuration key 104 * @return configuration value or null 105 */ 106 String getConfig(String key); 107 108 /** 109 * Show a notification to the user. 110 * 111 * @param message notification message 112 * @param type notification type (info, warning, error) 113 */ 114 void showNotification(String message, NotificationType type); 115 116 /** 117 * Get the current locale. 118 */ 119 String getLocale(); 120 } 121 122 /** 123 * Notification type for showNotification. 124 */ 125 enum NotificationType { 126 INFO, 127 WARNING, 128 ERROR 129 } 130 131 /** 132 * Metadata about this plugin API implementation. 133 */ 134 record PluginAPIMetadata(String name, String version) {} 135 }

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<?import javafx.scene.control.Label?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?>
<?import javafx.scene.shape.Circle?>
<?import io.github.palexdev.materialfx.controls.MFXButton?>
<?import io.github.palexdev.materialfx.controls.MFXScrollPane?>
<?import io.github.palexdev.materialfx.controls.MFXTextField?>

<BorderPane
        prefHeight="620.0"
        prefWidth="960.0"
        xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21"
        xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"
        fx:controller="fan.summer.controller.MainController"
        styleClass="app-window">

    <!-- 标题栏 - 无边框窗口 -->
    <top>
        <HBox styleClass="titlebar" prefHeight="44">
            <!-- Traffic Lights -->
            <HBox styleClass="traffic-lights" spacing="8" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                <StackPane>
                    <Circle radius="6" styleClass="tl-close"/>
                    <Label text="✕" styleClass="tl-icon"/>
                </StackPane>
                <StackPane>
                    <Circle radius="6" styleClass="tl-min"/>
                    <Label text="−" styleClass="tl-icon"/>
                </StackPane>
                <StackPane>
                    <Circle radius="6" styleClass="tl-max"/>
                    <Label text="+" styleClass="tl-icon"/>
                </StackPane>
            </HBox>

            <!-- 标题 -->
            <Label text="SwissKit" styleClass="titlebar-title" maxWidth="1" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>

            <!-- 操作按钮 -->
            <HBox styleClass="titlebar-actions" spacing="8">
                <MFXButton styleClass="titlebar-btn" text="🔔" tooltip="通知"/>
                <MFXButton styleClass="titlebar-btn" text="⚙️" tooltip="设置" onAction="#openSettings"/>
            </HBox>
        </HBox>
    </top>

    <!-- 主体区域 -->
    <center>
        <HBox styleClass="app-body">

            <!-- 侧边栏 -->
            <VBox styleClass="sidebar" prefWidth="220">
                <!-- 工具分类列表 -->
                <VBox styleClass="sidebar-section">
                    <Label text="工具" styleClass="sidebar-section-label"/>
                    <VBox fx:id="navTools" styleClass="nav-list" spacing="2"/>
                </VBox>

                <!-- 插件列表 -->
                <VBox styleClass="sidebar-section">
                    <Label text="插件" styleClass="sidebar-section-label"/>
                    <VBox fx:id="navPlugins" styleClass="nav-list" spacing="2"/>
                </VBox>

                <!-- 收藏夹 -->
                <VBox styleClass="sidebar-section">
                    <Label text="收藏" styleClass="sidebar-section-label"/>
                    <VBox fx:id="navFavorites" styleClass="nav-list" spacing="2"/>
                </VBox>

                <!-- 设置入口 -->
                <VBox VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
                <HBox styleClass="sidebar-footer" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                    <MFXButton text="⚙️ 设置" styleClass="nav-item" onAction="#openSettings"/>
                </HBox>
            </VBox>

            <!-- 内容区 -->
            <VBox styleClass="content-area" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS">

                <!-- 搜索栏 -->
                <HBox styleClass="search-wrap">
                    <MFXTextField fx:id="searchField"
                                  styleClass="search-bar"
                                  promptText="搜索工具..."
                                  prefHeight="38"
                                  floatMode="DISABLED"/>
                    <Label text="⌘K" styleClass="search-kbd"/>
                </HBox>

                <!-- 工具网格区域 -->
                <MFXScrollPane styleClass="content-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS">
                    <VBox spacing="16">
                        <!-- 常用工具 -->
                        <VBox styleClass="section">
                            <HBox styleClass="section-header" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                                <Label text="常用工具" styleClass="section-title"/>
                                <Label text="查看全部 →" styleClass="section-action"/>
                            </HBox>
                            <ScrollPane styleClass="tools-scroll" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="NEVER">
                                <FlowPane fx:id="toolsGrid" styleClass="tools-grid" hgap="10" vgap="10"/>
                            </ScrollPane>
                        </VBox>

                        <!-- 最近使用 -->
                        <VBox styleClass="section">
                            <Label text="最近使用" styleClass="section-title"/>
                            <ScrollPane styleClass="tools-scroll" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="NEVER">
                                <FlowPane fx:id="recentGrid" styleClass="tools-grid" hgap="10" vgap="10"/>
                            </ScrollPane>
                        </VBox>
                    </VBox>
                </MFXScrollPane>

                <!-- 详情面板 (初始隐藏) -->
                <VBox fx:id="detailPanel" styleClass="detail-panel" managed="false" visible="false" prefWidth="260">
                    <HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT">
                        <MFXButton text="✕" styleClass="detail-close" onAction="#closeDetail"/>
                    </HBox>
                    <VBox styleClass="detail-content" spacing="8">
                        <HBox styleClass="detail-icon-wrap" alignment="CENTER" prefWidth="56" prefHeight="56">
                            <Label fx:id="detailIcon" text="🔧" styleClass="detail-icon"/>
                        </HBox>
                        <Label fx:id="detailName" text="工具名称" styleClass="detail-name"/>
                        <Label fx:id="detailMeta" text="v1.0.0 · 内置" styleClass="detail-meta"/>
                        <Label fx:id="detailDesc" text="工具描述内容" styleClass="detail-desc" wrapText="true"/>
                        <MFXButton text="启动工具" styleClass="detail-launch" onAction="#launchTool"/>
                        <Separator styleClass="detail-divider"/>
                        <GridPane styleClass="detail-props" vgap="8">
                            <Label text="版本" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpVersion" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                            <Label text="类型" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpType" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                            <Label text="分类" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpCat" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                            <Label text="上次使用" styleClass="detail-prop-key"/>
                            <Label fx:id="dpLast" text="—" styleClass="detail-prop-val"/>
                        </GridPane>
                    </VBox>
                </VBox>
            </VBox>

        </HBox>
    </center>

    <!-- 状态栏 -->
    <bottom>
        <HBox styleClass="statusbar" prefHeight="28" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16">
            <Circle radius="3" styleClass="status-dot"/>
            <Label fx:id="statusTools" text="12 个工具" styleClass="status-text"/>
            <Label text="·" styleClass="status-sep"/>
            <Label fx:id="statusPlugins" text="3 个插件已加载" styleClass="status-text"/>
            <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
            <Label fx:id="statusClock" text="00:00:00" styleClass="status-text"/>
        </HBox>
    </bottom>

</BorderPane>

content.text:
完成了以下更新：

**1. app.fxml** - 重构为 JavaFX 布局结构：
- `BorderPane` 根节点（含标题栏 + 主体 + 状态栏）
- 标题栏：Traffic Lights（红绿灯按钮）+ 标题 + 操作按钮
- 侧边栏：`VBox` 分三个 section（工具、插件、收藏）+ 设置入口
- 内容区：`StackPane` 包含工具网格和可滑出的详情面板
- 状态栏：状态点 + 工具计数 + 插件计数 + 时钟

**2. app.css** - 新建玻璃态样式（参考 HTML 设计）：
- 暗色背景 + 玻璃效果变量
- 标题栏/侧边栏/工具卡片/详情面板样式
- Traffic Lights + 导航项 + 工具卡片 + 状态栏

**3. MainController.java** - 新建控制器：
- 协调侧边栏导航、工具网格、详情面板
- 支持插件注入（通过 `getNode()/getContent()` 获取 Node）
- 动态时钟 + 搜索过滤占位符

**4. 已有基础设施**（不需要修改）：
- `PluginAPI` 接口 - 插件通过 `getContent()` 返回 JavaFX Node
- `PluginRegistry` - 管理插件 UI 注入和生命周期
- `PluginLoader` - 热加载 JAR 插件
- `@SwissKitPage` 注解 - 支持 `nodeMethod()` 指定 JavaFX Node 获取方法

**插件内容注入流程**：
```
Plugin.getContent() → PluginRegistry.injectContent() → MainController.showView()
```

content.text:
已完成 Main.java 的修改：

## Main.java (JavaFX Application)

- 继承 `Application` 而非普通类
- 启动流程：
  1. `main()` 调用 `launch(args)`
  2. `init()` 后台初始化数据库 + I18n + Theme
  3. 显示 SplashScreen
  4. `start()` 加载 `app.fxml` 并显示主窗口
- 使用 `CountDownLatch` 确保初始化完成后再显示UI
- 加载 CSS 样式 (`/css/app.css`)
- 居中显示窗口 (960x620, 最小 800x500)
- 初始化 `PluginRegistry` 通知插件应用就绪

## 相关更新

- **SplashScreen.java** - 适配 JavaFX 的启动画面
- **ThemeManager.java** - 添加 `init()` 方法并实现 `LocaleChangeListener`
- **MainController.java** - 添加 `@FXML StackPane contentArea` 注入

## FXML 布局

```
BorderPane
├── top: titlebar (traffic lights + title + actions)
├── center: HBox
│   ├── sidebar: VBox (navTools + navPlugins + navFavorites)
│   └── content-area: VBox
│       ├── search-wrap
│       └── StackPane (contentArea)
```

Plugins should implement KitPage to be discovered, and can optionally 10 * implement this interface to receive lifecycle callbacks.

11 * 12 *

Example plugin implementation:

13 * 
{@code
14	 * @SwissKitPage(menuName = "My Tool", order = 10)
15	 * public class MyToolPage implements KitPage, PluginAPI {
16	 *     private Node content;
17	 *     private PluginContext context;
18	 *
19	 *     @Override
20	 *     public Node getContent() {
21	 *         return content;
22	 *     }
23	 *
24	 *     @Override
25	 *     public void onLoad(PluginContext context) {
26	 *         this.context = context;
27	 *         // Initialize plugin resources
28	 *     }
29	 *
30	 *     @Override
31	 *     public void onUnload() {
32	 *         // Cleanup resources
33	 *     }
34	 *
35	 *     @Override
36	 *     public void onSelected() {
37	 *         // Plugin was selected in UI
38	 *     }
39	 * }
40	 * }
41 */ 42 public interface PluginAPI { 43 44 /** 45 * Called when the plugin is loaded by the host application. 46 * 47 * @param context provides access to host services 48 */ 49 default void onLoad(PluginContext context) {} 50 51 /** 52 * Called when the plugin is unloaded or the application shuts down. 53 * Release any resources acquired during onLoad(). 54 */ 55 default void onUnload() {} 56 57 /** 58 * Called when the plugin is selected/activated in the UI. 59 * Use this to refresh data or start background tasks. 60 */ 61 default void onSelected() {} 62 63 /** 64 * Called when the plugin is deselected. 65 * Use this to pause background tasks or save state. 66 */ 67 default void onDeselected() {} 68 69 /** 70 * Returns the main content Node for this plugin. 71 * This will be injected into the application's content area. 72 * 73 * @return the Node to display 74 */ 75 Node getContent(); 76 77 /** 78 * Returns metadata about this plugin. 79 * 80 * @return plugin metadata 81 */ 82 default PluginAPIMetadata getMetadata() { 83 return new PluginAPIMetadata(getClass().getSimpleName(), "1.0.0"); 84 } 85 86 /** 87 * Context interface providing access to host application services. 88 */ 89 interface PluginContext { 90 /** 91 * Get the application stage controller. 92 */ 93 Object getMainController(); 94 95 /** 96 * Get the plugin registry for registering content. 97 */ 98 PluginRegistry getRegistry(); 99 100 /** 101 * Get a configuration value. 102 * 103 * @param key configuration key 104 * @return configuration value or null 105 */ 106 String getConfig(String key); 107 108 /** 109 * Show a notification to the user. 110 * 111 * @param message notification message 112 * @param type notification type (info, warning, error) 113 */ 114 void showNotification(String message, NotificationType type); 115 116 /** 117 * Get the current locale. 118 */ 119 String getLocale(); 120 } 121 122 /** 123 * Notification type for showNotification. 124 */ 125 enum NotificationType { 126 INFO, 127 WARNING, 128 ERROR 129 } 130 131 /** 132 * Metadata about this plugin API implementation. 133 */ 134 record PluginAPIMetadata(String name, String version) {} 135 }

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>fan.summer</groupId>
    <artifactId>SwissKit</artifactId>
    <version>2.1.1</version>

    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>21</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>21</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        <lombok.version>1.18.42</lombok.version>
    </properties>

    <!-- Import SwissKitJ-Api BOM for aligned dependency versions -->
    <dependencyManagement>
        <dependencies>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
                <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
                <version>2.2.0</version>
                <type>pom</type>
                <scope>import</scope>
            </dependency>
        </dependencies>
    </dependencyManagement>

    <dependencies>

        <!-- SwissKitJ-Api -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
            <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Lombok -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Excel -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.fesod</groupId>
            <artifactId>fesod-sheet</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- H2 Database -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.h2database</groupId>
            <artifactId>h2</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Mybatis -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.mybatis</groupId>
            <artifactId>mybatis</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Email -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.simplejavamail</groupId>
            <artifactId>simple-java-mail</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Force override vulnerable version transitively brought in by simple-java-mail -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.eclipse.angus</groupId>
            <artifactId>angus-mail</artifactId>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <profiles>
        <profile>
            <id>windows-exe</id>
            <activation>
                <os>
                    <family>windows</family>
                </os>
            </activation>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>com.akathist.maven.plugins.launch4j</groupId>
                        <artifactId>launch4j-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                        <version>2.7.0</version>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>l4j-clui</id>
                                <phase>package</phase>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>launch4j</goal>
                                </goals>
                                <configuration>
                                    <headerType>gui</headerType>
                                    <outfile>target/SwissKit.exe</outfile>
                                    <jar>target/SwissKit-${project.version}.jar</jar>
                                    <icon>src/main/resources/icons/SwissKit.ico</icon>
                                    <errTitle>SwissKit Error</errTitle>
                                    <downloadUrl>https://adoptium.net/</downloadUrl>
                                    <supportUrl>https://github.com/MuskStark/SwissKitJ</supportUrl>
                                    <jre>
                                        <minVersion>17</minVersion>
                                        <jdkPreference>preferJre</jdkPreference>
                                        <runtimeBits>64/32</runtimeBits>
                                    </jre>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
    </profiles>

    <build>
        <resources>
            <resource>
                <directory>src/main/resources</directory>
                <filtering>false</filtering>
            </resource>
        </resources>
        <plugins>
            <!-- Maven Shade Plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-shade-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.5.3</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <phase>package</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>shade</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <!-- 排除 JavaFX 模块签名，避免模块系统冲突 -->
                            <filters>
                                <filter>
                                    <artifact>org.openjfx:*</artifact>
                                    <excludes>
                                        <exclude>module-info.class</exclude>
                                    </excludes>
                                </filter>
                                <!-- 排除签名文件，防止 shade 后签名校验失败 -->
                                <filter>
                                    <artifact>*:*</artifact>
                                    <excludes>
                                        <exclude>META-INF/*.SF</exclude>
                                        <exclude>META-INF/*.DSA</exclude>
                                        <exclude>META-INF/*.RSA</exclude>
                                    </excludes>
                                </filter>
                            </filters>
                            <transformers>
                                <transformer
                                        implementation="org.apache.maven.plugins.shade.resource.ManifestResourceTransformer">
                                    <mainClass>fan.summer.Main</mainClass>
                                    <manifestEntries>
                                        <Implementation-Version>${project.version}</Implementation-Version>
                                    </manifestEntries>
                                </transformer>
                                <transformer
                                        implementation="org.apache.maven.plugins.shade.resource.ServicesResourceTransformer"/>
                            </transformers>
                            <finalName>SwissKit-${project.version}</finalName>
                            <createDependencyReducedPom>false</createDependencyReducedPom>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Maven Compiler Plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.13.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>21</source>
                    <target>21</target>
                    <encoding>UTF-8</encoding>
                    <annotationProcessorPaths>
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                            <version>${lombok.version}</version>
                        </path>
                    </annotationProcessorPaths>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>plugin.swisskitj</groupId>
    <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Plugin-HappyLearning</artifactId>
    <version>v1.1.2</version>

    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>21</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>21</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        <lombok.version>1.18.42</lombok.version>
    </properties>

    <!-- Import SwissKitJ-Api BOM for aligned dependency versions -->
    <dependencyManagement>
        <dependencies>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
                <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
                <version>2.2.0</version>
                <type>pom</type>
                <scope>import</scope>
            </dependency>
        </dependencies>
    </dependencyManagement>

    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
            <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId>
            <artifactId>junit-jupiter</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <finalName>${project.artifactId}-${project.version}</finalName>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.13.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>21</source>
                    <target>21</target>
                    <encoding>UTF-8</encoding>

                <version>3.2.2</version>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

                                    <outfile>target/SwissKit.exe</outfile>
                                    <jar>target/SwissKit-${project.version}.jar</jar>
                                    <icon>src/main/resources/icons/SwissKit.ico</icon>
                                    <errTitle>SwissKit Error</errTitle>
                                    <downloadUrl>https://adoptium.net/</downloadUrl>
                                    <supportUrl>https://github.com/MuskStark/SwissKitJ</supportUrl>
                                    <jre>
                                        <minVersion>17</minVersion>
                                        <jdkPreference>preferJre</jdkPreference>
                                        <runtimeBits>64/32</runtimeBits>
                                    </jre>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
    </profiles>

    <build>
        <resources>
            <resource>
                <directory>src/main/resources</directory>
                <filtering>false</filtering>
            </resource>
        </resources>
        <plugins>
            <!-- Maven Shade Plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-shade-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.5.3</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <phase>package</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>shade</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <!-- 排除 JavaFX 模块签名，避免模块系统冲突 -->
                            <filters>
                                <filter>
                                    <artifact>org.openjfx:*</artifact>
                                    <excludes>
                                        <exclude>module-info.class</exclude>
                                    </excludes>
                                </filter>
                                <!-- 排除签名文件，防止 shade 后签名校验失败 -->
                                <filter>
                                    <artifact>*:*</artifact>
                                    <excludes>
                                        <exclude>META-INF/*.SF</exclude>
                                        <exclude>META-INF/*.DSA</exclude>
                                        <exclude>META-INF/*.RSA</exclude>
                                    </excludes>
                                </filter>
                            </filters>
                            <transformers>
                                <transformer
                                        implementation="org.apache.maven.plugins.shade.resource.ManifestResourceTransformer">
                                    <mainClass>fan.summer.Main</mainClass>
                                    <manifestEntries>
                                        <Implementation-Version>${project.version}</Implementation-Version>
                                    </manifestEntries>
                                </transformer>
                                <transformer
                                        implementation="org.apache.maven.plugins.shade.resource.ServicesResourceTransformer"/>
                            </transformers>
                            <finalName>SwissKit-${project.version}</finalName>
                            <createDependencyReducedPom>false</createDependencyReducedPom>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Maven Compiler Plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.13.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>21</source>
                    <target>21</target>
                    <encoding>UTF-8</encoding>
                    <annotationProcessorPaths>
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                            <version>${lombok.version}</version>
                        </path>
                    </annotationProcessorPaths>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

Looking at the error and the files that use it:
- These are existing files that still use Swing/MigLayout
- But if the user has migrated to JavaFX, these Swing files should be updated/removed

The user is saying they're using JavaFX. So the files that reference `net.miginfocom.swing` are legacy files that haven't been migrated yet. 

I should not add miglayout-swing - instead, I should help the user identify which files are still using Swing/MigLayout and suggest migrating them or temporarily excluding them from compilation.

有两种处理方式：

1. **临时排除** - 在 pom.xml 中排除这些文件不编译
2. **迁移它们** - 将这些 Swing 组件改为 JavaFX

你想怎么处理？或者先告诉我哪些文件需要保留，我来帮你迁移到 JavaFX？

    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>fan.summer</groupId>
    <artifactId>SwissKit</artifactId>
    <version>2.1.1</version>

    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>21</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>21</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        <lombok.version>1.18.42</lombok.version>
    </properties>

    <!-- Import SwissKitJ-Api BOM for aligned dependency versions -->
    <dependencyManagement>
        <dependencies>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
                <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
                <version>3.0.0</version>
                <type>pom</type>
                <scope>import</scope>
            </dependency>
        </dependencies>
    </dependencyManagement>

    <dependencies>

        <!-- SwissKitJ-Api -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
            <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Lombok -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Excel -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.fesod</groupId>
            <artifactId>fesod-sheet</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- H2 Database -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.h2database</groupId>
            <artifactId>h2</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Mybatis -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.mybatis</groupId>
            <artifactId>mybatis</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Email -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.simplejavamail</groupId>
            <artifactId>simple-java-mail</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Swing MigLayout (for legacy Swing components being migrated) -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.miglayout</groupId>
            <artifactId>miglayout-swing</artifactId>
            <version>11.3</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Force override vulnerable version transitively brought in by simple-java-mail -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.eclipse.angus</groupId>
            <artifactId>angus-mail</artifactId>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <profiles>
        <profile>
            <id>windows-exe</id>
            <activation>
                <os>
                    <family>windows</family>
                </os>
            </activation>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>com.akathist.maven.plugins.launch4j</groupId>
                        <artifactId>launch4j-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                        <version>2.7.0</version>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>l4j-clui</id>
                                <phase>package</phase>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>launch4j</goal>
                                </goals>
                                <configuration>
                                    <headerType>gui</headerType>
                                    <outfile>target/SwissKit.exe</outfile>
                                    <jar>target/SwissKit-${project.version}.jar</jar>
                                    <icon>src/main/resources/icons/SwissKit.ico</icon>
                                    <errTitle>SwissKit Error</errTitle>
                                    <downloadUrl>https://adoptium.net/</downloadUrl>
                                    <supportUrl>https://github.com/MuskStark/SwissKitJ</supportUrl>
                                    <jre>
                                        <minVersion>17</minVersion>
                                        <jdkPreference>preferJre</jdkPreference>
                                        <runtimeBits>64/32</runtimeBits>
                                    </jre>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
    </profiles>

    <build>
        <resources>
            <resource>
                <directory>src/main/resources</directory>
                <filtering>false</filtering>
            </resource>
        </resources>
        <plugins>
            <!-- Maven Shade Plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-shade-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.5.3</version>

                            <filters>

                                        <Implementation-Version>${project.version}</Implementation-Version>
                                    </manifestEntries>
                                </transformer>
                                <transformer
                                        implementation="org.apache.maven.plugins.shade.resource.ServicesResourceTransformer"/>
                            </transformers>
                            <finalName>SwissKit-${project.version}</finalName>
                            <createDependencyReducedPom>false</createDependencyReducedPom>

        </plugins>
    </build>

</plugin>

            <!-- Maven Compiler Plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.13.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>21</source>
                    <target>21</target>
                    <encoding>UTF-8</encoding>
                    <annotationProcessorPaths>
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                            <version>${lombok.version}</version>
                        </path>
                    </annotationProcessorPaths>
                    <!-- Exclude legacy Swing files pending JavaFX migration -->
                    <excludes>
                        <exclude>**/StartLoadingPage.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/WelcomePage.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/EmailKitPage.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/EmailTagsView.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/EmailAddressBookView.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/AddAddressView.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/ExcelKitPage.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/ConfigView.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/ConfigEditorView.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/SettingKitPage.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/MassSentConfigView.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/ViewEmailSentLogView.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/plugin/swisskitj/QccToExcel.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/plugin/swisskit/hpl/ui/HappyLearning.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/plugin/swisskit/mouse/ui/KeepMove.java</exclude>
                    </excludes>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>fan.summer</groupId>
    <artifactId>SwissKit</artifactId>
    <version>2.1.1</version>

    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>21</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>21</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        <lombok.version>1.18.42</lombok.version>
    </properties>

    <!-- Import SwissKitJ-Api BOM for aligned dependency versions -->
    <dependencyManagement>
        <dependencies>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
                <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
                <version>3.0.0</version>
                <type>pom</type>
                <scope>import</scope>
            </dependency>
        </dependencies>
    </dependencyManagement>

    <dependencies>

        <!-- SwissKitJ-Api -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
            <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Lombok -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Excel -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.fesod</groupId>
            <artifactId>fesod-sheet</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- H2 Database -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.h2database</groupId>
            <artifactId>h2</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Mybatis -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.mybatis</groupId>
            <artifactId>mybatis</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Email -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.simplejavamail</groupId>
            <artifactId>simple-java-mail</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- MigLayout (for legacy Swing components pending JavaFX migration) -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.miglayout</groupId>
            <artifactId>miglayout-swing</artifactId>
            <version>11.3</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Force override vulnerable version transitively brought in by simple-java-mail -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.eclipse.angus</groupId>
            <artifactId>angus-mail</artifactId>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <profiles>
        <profile>
            <id>windows-exe</id>
            <activation>
                <os>
                    <family>windows</family>
                </os>
            </activation>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>com.akathist.maven.plugins.launch4j</groupId>
                        <artifactId>launch4j-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                        <version>2.7.0</version>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>l4j-clui</id>
                                <phase>package</phase>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>launch4j</goal>
                                </goals>
                                <configuration>
                                    <headerType>gui</headerType>
                                    <outfile>target/SwissKit.exe</outfile>
                                    <jar>target/SwissKit-${project.version}.jar</jar>
                                    <icon>src/main/resources/icons/SwissKit.ico</icon>
                                    <errTitle>SwissKit Error</errTitle>
                                    <downloadUrl>https://adoptium.net/</downloadUrl>
                                    <supportUrl>https://github.com/MuskStark/SwissKitJ</supportUrl>
                                    <jre>
                                        <minVersion>17</minVersion>
                                        <jdkPreference>preferJre</jdkPreference>
                                        <runtimeBits>64/32</runtimeBits>
                                    </jre>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
    </profiles>

    <build>
        <resources>
            <resource>
                <directory>src/main/resources</directory>
                <filtering>false</filtering>
            </resource>
        </resources>
        <plugins>
            <!-- Maven Shade Plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-shade-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.5.3</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <phase>package</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>shade</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <!-- 排除 JavaFX 模块签名，避免模块系统冲突 -->
                            <filters>
                                <filter>
                                    <artifact>org.openjfx:*</artifact>
                                    <excludes>
                                        <exclude>module-info.class</exclude>
                                    </excludes>
                                </filter>
                                <!-- 排除签名文件，防止 shade 后签名校验失败 -->
                                <filter>
                                    <artifact>*:*</artifact>
                                    <excludes>
                                        <exclude>META-INF/*.SF</exclude>
                                        <exclude>META-INF/*.DSA</exclude>
                                        <exclude>META-INF/*.RSA</exclude>
                                    </excludes>
                                </filter>
                            </filters>
                            <transformers>
                                <transformer
                                        implementation="org.apache.maven.plugins.shade.resource.ManifestResourceTransformer">
                                    <mainClass>fan.summer.Main</mainClass>
                                    <manifestEntries>
                                        <Implementation-Version>${project.version}</Implementation-Version>
                                    </manifestEntries>
                                </transformer>
                                <transformer
                                        implementation="org.apache.maven.plugins.shade.resource.ServicesResourceTransformer"/>
                            </transformers>
                            <finalName>SwissKit-${project.version}</finalName>
                            <createDependencyReducedPom>false</createDependencyReducedPom>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Maven Compiler Plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.13.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>21</source>
                    <target>21</target>
                    <encoding>UTF-8</encoding>
                    <annotationProcessorPaths>
                        <path>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                            <version>${lombok.version}</version>
                        </path>
                    </annotationProcessorPaths>
                    <!-- Exclude legacy Swing files pending JavaFX migration -->
                    <excludes>
                        <exclude>**/StartLoadingPage.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/WelcomePage.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/EmailKitPage.java</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/EmailTagsView.java</exclude>

    private Pane buildOrbLayer() {
        Pane layer = new Pane();
        layer.setMouseTransparent(true);
        layer.setStyle("-fx-background-color: #0d0e11;");

        // 三个彩色高斯模糊光球
        layer.getChildren().addAll(
            orb(480, "#3b5bdb", -80, -120, 0),
            orb(360, "#7048e8",  -60, 200,  -6000),
            orb(300, "#1c7ed6",  300, 400, -12000)
        );
        return layer;
    }

    private StackPane orb(double size, String color, double x, double y, double animDelay) {
        Circle c = new Circle(size / 2,
            Color.web(color, 0.28));
        c.setEffect(new javafx.scene.effect.GaussianBlur(60));

        StackPane wrap = new StackPane(c);
        wrap.setTranslateX(x);
        wrap.setTranslateY(y);
        wrap.setMouseTransparent(true);

        // 漂浮动画
        TranslateTransition drift = new TranslateTransition(Duration.millis(18000), wrap);
        drift.setByX(30); drift.setByY(20);
        drift.setAutoReverse(true);
        drift.setCycleCount(Animation.INDEFINITE);
        drift.setDelay(Duration.millis(Math.abs(animDelay)));
        drift.setInterpolator(Interpolator.EASE_BOTH);
        drift.play();

        ScaleTransition breathe = new ScaleTransition(Duration.millis(12000), wrap);
        breathe.setFromX(1.0); breathe.setFromY(1.0);
        breathe.setToX(1.08);  breathe.setToY(1.08);
        breathe.setAutoReverse(true);
        breathe.setCycleCount(Animation.INDEFINITE);
        breathe.setInterpolator(Interpolator.EASE_BOTH);
        breathe.play();

        return wrap;
    }

    // ── 状态栏 ───────────────────────────────────────────

    private HBox buildStatusBar() {
        // 活动指示点
        Circle dot = new Circle(3, Color.web("#4cd97b"));
        dot.setEffect(new javafx.scene.effect.Glow(0.8));
        FadeTransition pulse = new FadeTransition(Duration.millis(2500), dot);
        pulse.setFromValue(1.0); pulse.setToValue(0.4);
        pulse.setAutoReverse(true); pulse.setCycleCount(Animation.INDEFINITE);
        pulse.play();

        Label sep = statusText("·");
        sep.setStyle("-fx-text-fill: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); -fx-font-size: 11px;");

        Region spacer = new Region();
        HBox.setHgrow(spacer, Priority.ALWAYS);

        HBox bar = new HBox(10);
        bar.getStyleClass().add("statusbar");
        bar.setAlignment(Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
        bar.setPadding(new Insets(0, 16, 0, 16));
        bar.getChildren().addAll(dot, statusToolCount, sep, statusPluginCount, spacer, clockLabel);
        return bar;
    }
